content_documents_published_consistent.name: content_documents_published_consistent
content_documents_published_consistent.value:
("content_documents"."published" is null and "content_documents"."published_version" is null and "content_documents"."published_at" is null)
        or ("content_documents"."published" is not null and "content_documents"."published_version" is not null
          and "content_documents"."published_version" > 0 and "content_documents"."published_version" <= "content_documents"."version"
          and "content_documents"."published_at" is not null)

document_scan_jobs_lease_matches_status.name: document_scan_jobs_lease_matches_status
document_scan_jobs_lease_matches_status.value:
("document_scan_jobs"."status" = 'processing'
          and "document_scan_jobs"."lease_token" is not null and "document_scan_jobs"."lease_expires_at" is not null)
        or ("document_scan_jobs"."status" <> 'processing'
          and "document_scan_jobs"."lease_token" is null and "document_scan_jobs"."lease_expires_at" is null)

document_scan_jobs_finished_at_matches_s.name: document_scan_jobs_finished_at_matches_status
document_scan_jobs_finished_at_matches_s.value:
("document_scan_jobs"."status" in ('completed', 'dead_letter') and "document_scan_jobs"."finished_at" is not null)
        or ("document_scan_jobs"."status" not in ('completed', 'dead_letter') and "document_scan_jobs"."finished_at" is null)

documents_original_name_safe.name: documents_original_name_safe
documents_original_name_safe.value:
char_length(btrim("documents"."original_name")) > 0
        and position('/' in "documents"."original_name") = 0
        and position(chr(92) in "documents"."original_name") = 0

documents_storage_key_safe.name: documents_storage_key_safe
documents_storage_key_safe.value:
char_length(btrim("documents"."storage_key")) > 0
        and left("documents"."storage_key", 1) <> '/'
        and position('..' in "documents"."storage_key") = 0
        and position(chr(92) in "documents"."storage_key") = 0

documents_scan_metadata_not_blank.name: documents_scan_metadata_not_blank
documents_scan_metadata_not_blank.value:
("documents"."scan_engine" is null or char_length(btrim("documents"."scan_engine")) > 0)
        and ("documents"."scan_engine_version" is null or char_length(btrim("documents"."scan_engine_version")) > 0)

documents_scan_timestamps_match_status.name: documents_scan_timestamps_match_status
documents_scan_timestamps_match_status.value:
("documents"."scan_status" in ('pending', 'scanning')
          and "documents"."scan_completed_at" is null and "documents"."available_at" is null)
        or ("documents"."scan_status" = 'clean'
          and "documents"."scan_completed_at" is not null and "documents"."available_at" is not null)
        or ("documents"."scan_status" in ('infected', 'failed')
          and "documents"."scan_completed_at" is not null and "documents"."available_at" is null)

integration_outbox_dependency_matches_op.name: integration_outbox_dependency_matches_operation
integration_outbox_dependency_matches_op.value:
("integration_outbox"."operation" = 'upsert_partner' and "integration_outbox"."depends_on_operation" is null)
        or ("integration_outbox"."operation" = 'create_crm'
          and "integration_outbox"."depends_on_operation" is not null
          and "integration_outbox"."depends_on_operation" = 'upsert_partner')
        or ("integration_outbox"."operation" = 'create_docs'
          and "integration_outbox"."depends_on_operation" is not null
          and "integration_outbox"."depends_on_operation" = 'create_crm')

integration_outbox_lease_matches_status.name: integration_outbox_lease_matches_status
integration_outbox_lease_matches_status.value:
("integration_outbox"."status" = 'processing'
          and "integration_outbox"."lease_token" is not null and "integration_outbox"."lease_expires_at" is not null)
        or ("integration_outbox"."status" <> 'processing'
          and "integration_outbox"."lease_token" is null and "integration_outbox"."lease_expires_at" is null)

integration_outbox_result_key_matches_st.name: integration_outbox_result_key_matches_status
integration_outbox_result_key_matches_st.value:
("integration_outbox"."status" = 'completed'
          and "integration_outbox"."result_key" is not null and char_length(btrim("integration_outbox"."result_key")) > 0)
        or ("integration_outbox"."status" <> 'completed' and "integration_outbox"."result_key" is null)

integration_outbox_last_error_consistent.name: integration_outbox_last_error_consistent
integration_outbox_last_error_consistent.value:
("integration_outbox"."last_error_code" is null and "integration_outbox"."last_error_at" is null)
        or ("integration_outbox"."last_error_code" is not null and char_length(btrim("integration_outbox"."last_error_code")) > 0
          and "integration_outbox"."last_error_at" is not null)

integration_outbox_completed_at_matches_.name: integration_outbox_completed_at_matches_status
integration_outbox_completed_at_matches_.value:
("integration_outbox"."status" = 'completed' and "integration_outbox"."completed_at" is not null)
        or ("integration_outbox"."status" <> 'completed' and "integration_outbox"."completed_at" is null)

max_bot_outbox_completed_at_matches_stat.name: max_bot_outbox_completed_at_matches_status
max_bot_outbox_completed_at_matches_stat.value:
("max_bot_outbox"."status" = 'completed' and "max_bot_outbox"."completed_at" is not null)
        or ("max_bot_outbox"."status" <> 'completed' and "max_bot_outbox"."completed_at" is null)

max_users_optional_names_not_blank.name: max_users_optional_names_not_blank
max_users_optional_names_not_blank.value:
("max_users"."last_name" is null or char_length(btrim("max_users"."last_name")) > 0)
        and ("max_users"."username" is null or char_length(btrim("max_users"."username")) > 0)

sessions_verified_contact_consistent.name: sessions_verified_contact_consistent
sessions_verified_contact_consistent.value:
("sessions"."verified_phone" is null and "sessions"."phone_verified_at" is null)
        or ("sessions"."verified_phone" is not null and "sessions"."phone_verified_at" is not null)

submissions_location_present.name: submissions_location_present
submissions_location_present.value:
("submissions"."city" is null or char_length(btrim("submissions"."city")) > 0)
        and ("submissions"."region" is null or char_length(btrim("submissions"."region")) > 0)
        and ("submissions"."city" is not null or "submissions"."region" is not null)

upload_sessions_original_name_safe.name: upload_sessions_original_name_safe
upload_sessions_original_name_safe.value:
char_length(btrim("upload_sessions"."original_name")) > 0
        and position('/' in "upload_sessions"."original_name") = 0
        and position(chr(92) in "upload_sessions"."original_name") = 0

upload_sessions_quarantine_storage_key_s.name: upload_sessions_quarantine_storage_key_safe
upload_sessions_quarantine_storage_key_s.value:
char_length(btrim("upload_sessions"."quarantine_storage_key")) > 0
        and left("upload_sessions"."quarantine_storage_key", 1) <> '/'
        and position('..' in "upload_sessions"."quarantine_storage_key") = 0
        and position(chr(92) in "upload_sessions"."quarantine_storage_key") = 0

upload_sessions_lease_matches_status.name: upload_sessions_lease_matches_status
upload_sessions_lease_matches_status.value:
("upload_sessions"."status" = 'uploading'
          and "upload_sessions"."lease_token" is not null and "upload_sessions"."lease_expires_at" is not null)
        or ("upload_sessions"."status" <> 'uploading'
          and "upload_sessions"."lease_token" is null and "upload_sessions"."lease_expires_at" is null)

upload_sessions_uploaded_metadata_matche.name: upload_sessions_uploaded_metadata_matches_status
upload_sessions_uploaded_metadata_matche.value:
"upload_sessions"."status" not in ('uploaded', 'completed')
        or ("upload_sessions"."received_size_bytes" is not null and "upload_sessions"."uploaded_at" is not null)

upload_sessions_document_matches_status.name: upload_sessions_document_matches_status
upload_sessions_document_matches_status.value:
("upload_sessions"."status" = 'completed'
          and "upload_sessions"."document_id" is not null and "upload_sessions"."completed_at" is not null)
        or ("upload_sessions"."status" <> 'completed'
          and "upload_sessions"."document_id" is null and "upload_sessions"."completed_at" is null)

webhook_inbox_processed_at_matches_statu.name: webhook_inbox_processed_at_matches_status
webhook_inbox_processed_at_matches_statu.value:
("webhook_inbox"."status" = 'processed' and "webhook_inbox"."processed_at" is not null)
        or ("webhook_inbox"."status" <> 'processed' and "webhook_inbox"."processed_at" is null)
